mapper.sql:
/* wms-ctmaster-strategyplcm-sql-oracle.xml - selectListStgPlcmHdsql - 적치 전략 헤더 조회 SQL */ SELECT '0' AS CHK , A.CTKEY , B.CTNM , A.PLCMSTGHDKEY , A.PLCMSTGNM , A.PLCMSTGDIVCD , A.USEYN , A.CMT , A.INSERTDATE , A.INSERTURKEY , A.UPDATEDATE , A.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_MST_PLCM_STG_HD A INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY WHERE 1=1
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
mapper.select: /* wms-ctmaster-strategyplcm-sql-oracle.xml - selectListStgPlcmDt - 적치 전략 상세 조회 SQL */ SELECT CTKEY , PLCMSTGHDKEY , DTSEQNO , PLCMSTGATCD , PLCMSTGATDIVCD , ATVALUE1 , ATVALUE2 , CMT , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_MST_PLCM_STG_DT WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND PLCMSTGHDKEY = #{plcmstghdkey}

/* wms-ctmaster-strategyplcm-sql-oracle.xml - selectIcLcRecomMap - 상품 대표로케이션 추천 정보 조회 */ SELECT A.ICKEY , A.LCKEY , B.* , C.ARNM , D.ZNNM , E.CTCDDTNM AS LCSTORGTYPENM FROM TWORK_INFO_IC_LC_RECOM A INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.LCKEY = B.LCKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_AR C ON A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND B.ZNKEY = C.ZNKEY AND B.ARKEY = C.ARKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ZN D ON A.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND B.ZNKEY = D.ZNKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT E ON A.CTKEY = E.CTKEY AND B.LCSTORGTYPECD = E.CTCDDTKEY AND E.CTCDHDKEY = 'LCSTORGTYPECD' AND E.LAKEY = 'KOR' WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.ICKEY = #{ickey} AND A.CRITDAY = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDD')
